mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CREATED', 'PAYMENT_PENDING', 'PAYMENT_FAILED') THEN 'PENDING' WHEN order_status IN ('PAID', 'CHECK_FRAUD', 'FRAUD_HOLD', 'PROCESSING', 'ON_HOLD') THEN 'PROCESSING' WHEN order_status IN ('SHIPPED', 'PARTIALLY_SHIPPED') THEN 'SHIPPED' WHEN order_status IN ('DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED') THEN 'DELIVERED' WHEN order_status IN ('CANCELLED', 'CANCEL_REQUESTED', 'CANCELLATION_DENIED', 'CHECK_CANCELLATION_WINDOW') THEN 'CANCELLED' WHEN order_status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED', 'REFUND_REQUESTED', 'REFUNDED', 'DELIVERY_FAILED') THEN 'RETURNS' ELSE order_status END as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat GROUP BY "stateId"
SELECT order_status as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY "count" DESC

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_status = 'BREACHED' THEN 1 END) as "breached", COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_status = 'AT_RISK' THEN 1 END) as "atRisk", COUNT(CASE WHEN total_amount > 1000000 THEN 1 END) as "highValue" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT count(*) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE sla_status IN ('AT_RISK', 'BREACHED') AND order_status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED')

SELECT order_id as "id", order_number as "orderNumber", order_date as "createdAt", order_status as "stateId", total_amount as "totalAmount", customer_name as "customerName", seller_name as "sellerName", carrier as "carrier", sla_status as "slaStatus", sla_breach_hours as "slaBreachHours", shipping_state as "shippingState" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE sla_status IN ('AT_RISK', 'BREACHED') AND order_status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') ORDER BY sla_breach_hours DESC ${pagination}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_breach_hours >= 4 AND sla_breach_hours < 8 THEN 1 END) as "pending4hrs", COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_breach_hours >= 8 THEN 1 END) as "pending8hrs", COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_status = 'AT_RISK' THEN 1 END) as "atRisk", COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_status = 'BREACHED' THEN 1 END) as "breached", COUNT(*) as "total" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE sla_status IN ('AT_RISK', 'BREACHED') AND order_status NOT IN ('DELIVERED', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED')
SELECT DISTINCT payment_method as "paymentMethod", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE payment_method IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT DISTINCT shipping_state as "state", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE shipping_state IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shipping_state ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT DISTINCT carrier as "carrier", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE carrier IS NOT NULL GROUP BY carrier ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT DISTINCT seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE seller_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY seller_name

SELECT order_id as "id", order_number as "orderNumber", order_date as "createdAt", order_status as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", total_amount as "totalAmount", subtotal as "subtotal", tax_amount as "taxAmount", shipping_amount as "shippingAmount", discount_amount as "discountAmount", item_count as "itemCount", currency as "currency", coupon_codes as "couponCodes", customer_id as "customerId", customer_name as "customerName", customer_email as "customerEmail", customer_phone as "customerPhone", customer_tier as "customerTier", seller_id as "sellerId", seller_name as "sellerName", seller_tier as "sellerTier", first_product_name as "productName", payment_id as "paymentId", payment_method as "paymentMethod", payment_status as "paymentStatus", gateway_name as "gatewayName", gateway_fee as "gatewayFee", shipment_id as "shipmentId", carrier as "carrier", tracking_number as "trackingNumber", shipped_at as "shippedAt", estimated_delivery_date as "estimatedDelivery", actual_delivery_date as "actualDelivery", shipping_address_line as "shippingAddress", shipping_city as "shippingCity", shipping_state as "shippingState", shipping_pincode as "shippingPincode", sla_status as "slaStatus", sla_breach_hours as "slaBreachHours", commission_amount as "commissionAmount", commission_rate as "commissionRate", seller_payout as "sellerPayout" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_id = #{id}

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", product_name as "productName", sku as "sku", quantity as "quantity", unit_price as "unitPrice", total_price as "totalPrice", tax_amount as "taxAmount", discount_amount as "discountAmount", supplier_id as "supplierId", supplier_name as "supplierName", image_url as "imageUrl", hsn_code as "hsnCode", return_eligible as "returnEligible", fulfillment_status as "fulfillmentStatus" FROM hm_query.order_items_flat WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, action as "action", description as "description", performed_by as "performedBy", created_time as "createdTime" FROM hm_query.order_activity_flat WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT order_id as "id", order_number as "orderNumber", order_date as "createdAt", order_status as "stateId", total_amount as "totalAmount", first_product_name as "productName" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND order_id != #{excludeOrderId} ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT id, event_type as "eventType", location as "location", description as "description", event_time as "eventTime" FROM hm_query.shipment_tracking_flat WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY event_time ASC

SELECT id, risk_score as "riskScore", risk_level as "riskLevel", payment_risk as "paymentRisk", address_verified as "addressVerified", assessment_status as "status", assessed_at as "assessedAt" FROM hm_query.order_risk_flat WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT order_id as "orderId", order_number as "orderNumber", first_product_name as "productName", total_items as "totalItems", total_amount as "itemSalesAmount", order_date as "orderDate", commission_amount as "commissionAmount", seller_payout as "sellerPayout" FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE seller_id = #{supplierId} AND order_status = 'DELIVERED' ${orderby} ${pagination}
